questions.question: Embroidery kya hai?

options.B: Needle aur thread se fabric par decorative patterns banana
options.C: Fabric ko cut karke naye kapde banana

questions.explanation: Embroidery ek art hai jisme needle aur thread ka use karke fabric par decorative designs banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Fabric ko tight aur stable rakhne ke liye kaunsa tool use hota hai?

options.B: Embroidery Hoop

questions.explanation: Embroidery hoop fabric ko tight aur stable hold karta hai, jisse stitching easy ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Apni ungliyon ko needle pricks se bachane ke liye kaunsa tool use kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Seam Ripper

questions.explanation: Thimble ek small metal ya plastic cap hai jo ungli par pehna jaata hai, needle pricks se bachne aur needle ko push karne ke liye.

questions.question: Design ko paper se fabric par transfer karne ke liye commonly kya use hota hai, khaaskar dark fabrics par?

options.B: Tracing paper

questions.explanation: Carbon paper (dressmaker's carbon) design ko paper se fabric par transfer karne ka ek effective method hai, khaaskar dark fabrics par jahan pencil marks dikhte nahi.

questions.question: Sabse basic aur simple embroidery stitch kaunsa hai?

options.B: Satin Stitch

questions.explanation: Running stitch sabse basic aur easy stitch hai jisme needle ko fabric ke andar aur bahar equal intervals par move kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Backstitch ki main khaasiyat kya hai?

options.B: Yeh ek continuous, solid line banata hai
options.C: Yeh sirf filling ke liye use hota hai
options.D: Yeh bahut jaldi ban jaata hai

questions.explanation: Backstitch ek strong aur continuous line banata hai, jo outlines aur lettering ke liye ideal hai. Har stitch previous stitch ke end point se start hota hai.

questions.question: Stem stitch primarily kisliye use hota hai?

options.A: Large areas ko fill karne ke liye
options.B: Thin stems, outlines aur curves banane ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko join karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Stem stitch apne rope-like texture ke liye jaana jaata hai aur yeh thin lines, floral stems aur outlines banane ke liye perfect hai.

questions.question: Fabric ko embroidery hoop mein secure karte waqt kya ensure karna chahiye?

options.B: Fabric evenly stretched aur wrinkle-free hona chahiye
options.C: Fabric sirf ek side se tight ho

questions.explanation: Fabric ko evenly stretch karna aur wrinkle-free rakhna zaroori hai, taaki embroidery smooth aur uniform bane.

questions.question: Embroidery ke liye kaunse type ki needle sabse zyada use hoti hai?

options.B: Tapestry needle (blunt tip)

questions.explanation: Embroidery ya Crewel needles sharp tipped hoti hain aur inka eye bada hota hai, jisse multiple strands of thread easily pass ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Embroidery mein scissors ka primary use kya hai?

options.B: Threads ko trim karna

questions.explanation: Embroidery mein, small, sharp scissors (jaise snips) ka use threads ko cleanly trim karne ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Embroidery start karne se pehle fabric preparation mein kya step include hota hai?

options.B: Fabric ko wash aur press karna

questions.explanation: Fabric ko wash aur press karne se uski shrinkage aur wrinkles remove ho jaate hain, jo embroidery ki quality ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Embroidery area mein good lighting kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Aankhon par strain kam karne aur details clearly dekhne ke liye
options.C: Fabric ko garam rakhne ke liye
options.D: Design ko highlight karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Achhi lighting aankhon ke strain ko kam karti hai aur aapko fine details par focus karne mein help karti hai, jisse kaam ki accuracy badhti hai.

questions.question: Apne work area ko clean aur organized rakhna kyun important hai?

options.A: Designs ko kharab hone se bachane ke liye
options.B: Threads ko ganda hone se bachane aur tools ko aasani se dhundhne ke liye
options.C: Customer ko impress karne ke liye
options.D: Sare tools ko ek saath rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Clean aur organized workspace threads ko ganda hone se bachata hai, tools ko easily accessible rakhta hai, aur overall efficiency badhata hai.

questions.question: Fabric ko wash karna design transfer se pehle kyun important ho sakta hai?

options.A: Taaki fabric colour loose na kare
options.B: Taaki fabric mein koi shrinkage na ho embroidery ke baad
options.D: Taaki fabric par marks na lagein

questions.explanation: Fabric ko pre-wash karne se uski shrinkage khatam ho jaati hai, jisse embroidery ke baad design distort nahi hota.

questions.question: Embroidery mein commonly use hone wale kuch thread types ke naam bataiye.

options.B: Silk, Cotton, Rayon, Metallic

questions.explanation: Embroidery mein silk, cotton, rayon aur metallic threads jaise kai tarah ke threads use hote hain, har ek ki apni unique properties aur sheen hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek beginner ke liye kaunsa stitch sabse pehle seekhna chahiye?

options.B: Satin Stitch

questions.explanation: Running stitch sabse basic aur easy stitch hai, jo beginners ko embroidery ki fundamentals samjhne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Light-coloured aur delicate fabrics par design transfer ke liye sabse best aur safest method kaunsa hai, jisse fabric ko nuksan na ho?

options.B: Carbon paper

questions.explanation: Light box ya window tracing method light aur delicate fabrics ke liye sabse safest hai, kyunki isme fabric par koi direct chemical ya pressure nahi lagta, jisse marks ya damage ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Zari work mein primarily kaunse type ke threads use hote hain?

options.B: Silk threads

questions.explanation: Zari work apni metallic sheen ke liye jaana jaata hai, jisme gold, silver plated ya imitation metallic threads ka use hota hai.

questions.question: Aari work mein use hone wali khas needle ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Tapestry needle

questions.explanation: Aari needle ek hook-tipped tool hai jo chain stitch aur quick, intricate work ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Zardozi work mein kaunse embellishments commonly use hote hain?

options.B: Sequins, beads, kora, dabka, stones

questions.explanation: Zardozi work apni richness ke liye jaana jaata hai, jisme metallic threads ke saath sequins, beads, kora, dabka aur stones ka use hota hai.

questions.question: Kora aur Dabka Zari work mein kya hain?

options.B: Do different types ke needles
options.C: Metallic wire coils, kora springy hota hai aur dabka flat/crushed

questions.explanation: Kora aur Dabka Zari work mein use hone wale metallic wire coils hain. Kora springy hota hai aur Dabka flat ya crushed hota hai.

questions.question: Heavy Zari work ke liye fabric ko secure karne ke liye kaunsa frame use hota hai?

options.B: Round plastic hoop

questions.explanation: Adda frame ek traditional wooden frame hai jo heavy aur large-scale Zari work ke liye fabric ko tightly stretch karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Tilla work kya hai?

options.B: Gold ya silver metallic thread se ki gayi embroidery, khas kashmir mein

questions.explanation: Tilla work Kashmir ki ek traditional embroidery hai jisme gold ya silver metallic threads ka use kiya jaata hai, jo aksar Pashmina shawls par dekhi jaati hai.

questions.question: Heavy Zari work ke liye kaunsa fabric sabse suitable hai aur kyun?

options.B: Silk ya Velvet, unki strength aur luxurious drape ke liye

questions.explanation: Heavy Zari work ke liye Silk aur Velvet jaise fabrics preferred hote hain kyunki unki inherent strength, durability aur luxurious drape heavy embellishments ko support kar sakte hain bina fabric ke distort ya tear hue.

questions.question: Real Zari aur Imitation Zari mein kya farak hai?

options.A: Dono same hain, bas naam alag hain
options.B: Real Zari mein pure gold/silver hota hai, imitation mein synthetic/metallic coating
options.C: Real Zari machine-made hoti hai, imitation hand-made
options.D: Real Zari sirf silk par hoti hai, imitation kisi bhi fabric par

questions.explanation: Real Zari mein pure gold ya silver ka use hota hai, jo bahut expensive hota hai. Imitation Zari mein copper wire par gold/silver-coloured metallic coating hoti hai ya synthetic threads ka use hota hai.

questions.question: Sadi stitch Zari work mein kis kaam aata hai?

options.B: Filling large areas with metallic thread
options.D: Fabric ko join karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sadi stitch Zari work mein large areas ko metallic threads se fill karne ke liye use hota hai, jisse ek smooth aur shiny surface banti hai.

questions.question: Tikki work kya hai?

options.B: Small, flat metallic sequins ya spangles ka use
options.D: Zari work ke liye use hone wala fabric

questions.explanation: Tikki work Zari embroidery ka ek part hai jisme small, flat circular metallic sequins ya spangles ko fabric par stitch kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Zari threads ko tangling aur breakage se kaise bachayein, khaaskar jab long length mein kaam kar rahe hon?

options.B: Short thread lengths use karein, ya thread conditioner apply karein
options.D: Kisi bhi thread ka use karein

questions.explanation: Zari threads delicate hote hain. Short lengths mein kaam karna aur thread conditioner ka use karna tangling aur breakage ko minimize karta hai.

questions.question: Zari work ki finishing mein kya steps hote hain?

options.B: Extra threads trim karna, backing lagana, aur gentle pressing

questions.explanation: Finishing mein loose threads ko trim karna, backing fabric lagana (agar zaroori ho) aur gentle pressing shamil hai taaki work neat aur durable lage.

questions.question: Zari thread ko fabric par attach karne ka common method kya hai?

options.B: Couching method, jisme Zari thread ko ek alag thread se secure kiya jaata hai

questions.explanation: Couching method mein Zari thread ko fabric par rakha jaata hai aur phir ek fine matching thread se usko chhote-chhote stitches se secure kiya jaata hai. Yeh Zari thread ko damage hone se bachata hai.

questions.question: Zari work garments ki care kaise karte hain?

options.B: Strong detergents se wash karna
options.C: Dry clean ya hand wash with mild detergent, avoid direct sun exposure

questions.explanation: Zari work delicate hota hai. Isliye dry clean ya gentle hand wash with mild detergent prefer kiya jaata hai. Direct sunlight se colour fade ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Zari work mein motifs kaise develop karte hain, jo traditional aur contemporary dono ho?

options.B: Inspiration from nature, historical patterns, aur client's vision ko combine karke sketches banana

questions.explanation: Creative Zari motifs develop karne ke liye natural elements, historical designs aur client ki preferences se inspiration lekar sketches banaye jaate hain, jo traditional aesthetics ko modern touch de sakte hain.

questions.question: Zari work mein dabka ko fabric par attach karne ka sabse common method kya hai?

options.B: Ek needle aur thread se dabka ko fabric par stitch karna, loop bana kar

questions.explanation: Dabka ko fabric par attach karne ke liye, use needle aur thread ki madad se fabric par stitch kiya jaata hai, jisse woh secure ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Zari embroidery mein 'Katori' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ek small, cup-shaped metallic embellishment

questions.explanation: Katori Zari work mein use hone wala ek small, cup-shaped metallic embellishment hai jo design mein volume add karta hai.

questions.question: Mirror work mein kaunse main materials use hote hain?

options.B: Small pieces of mirror (real glass ya acrylic) aur embroidery thread

questions.explanation: Mirror work mein chhote sheeshe (real ya acrylic) aur embroidery threads ka use kiya jaata hai unhe fabric par secure karne ke liye.

questions.question: Mirrors ko fabric par attach karne ka sabse common stitch kaunsa hai?

options.B: Buttonhole stitch (ya Blanket stitch)

questions.explanation: Buttonhole stitch (ya Blanket stitch) mirrors ko fabric par securely attach karne aur unhe decorative edge dene ke liye sabse popular stitch hai.

questions.question: Shisha work kya hai?

options.B: Traditional Indian mirror embroidery

questions.explanation: Shisha work traditional Indian mirror embroidery ko refer karta hai, jisme chhote-chhote mirrors ko fabric par stitch kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Plastic mirrors ke kya advantages hain real glass mirrors ke comparison mein?

options.B: Lighter, safer to handle, aur break hone ka risk kam hota hai
options.D: Sirf traditional designs mein use hote hain

questions.explanation: Plastic mirrors lightweight, break-resistant aur safer hote hain, khaaskar garments aur home decor items ke liye jahan durability aur safety important hai.

questions.question: Real glass mirrors use karte waqt kya safety precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Gloves pehnein aur carefully handle karein taaki cuts na lagein

questions.explanation: Real glass mirrors sharp edges hone ke karan cuts de sakte hain, isliye unhe carefully handle karna aur gloves pehna wise hota hai.

questions.question: Mirror work ke liye kaunsa fabric sabse suitable hai aur kyun?

options.A: Delicate silk, uski smoothness ke liye
options.B: Sturdy cotton ya denim, mirrors ke weight ko support karne ke liye
options.C: Sheer organza, uski transparency ke liye
options.D: Stretchable lycra, uski flexibility ke liye

questions.explanation: Mirror work mein mirrors ka weight fabric par aata hai, isliye sturdy fabrics jaise cotton, denim ya canvas prefer kiye jaate hain jo is weight ko support kar sakein aur sag na ho.

questions.question: Small mirrors ko fabric par attach karne ka sabse quick tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Ek simple cross stitch ya straight stitches se secure karna

questions.explanation: Small mirrors ko quick aur effectively attach karne ke liye, unhe ek simple cross stitch ya kuch straight stitches se secure kiya jaa sakta hai, phir uske upar decorative stitches kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Mirror work mein design balance aur symmetry kaise maintain karte hain, khaaskar jab multiple mirrors use kar rahe hon?

options.B: Kisi bhi pattern ko follow karna
options.C: Pehle design ko fabric par mark karna aur mirrors ko symmetrically place karna

questions.explanation: Design balance ke liye, mirrors ko evenly distribute karna aur ek pre-marked pattern ya grid par place karna zaroori hai, taaki final piece aesthetically pleasing lage.

questions.question: Mirror work mein buttonhole stitch ka use kya hai?

options.B: Mirrors ko fabric par securely attach karna aur unhe decorative outline dena

questions.explanation: Buttonhole stitch mirrors ko fabric par tightly hold karta hai aur unhe ek neat, decorative border provide karta hai, jo is technique ka hallmark hai.

questions.question: Mirror work garments ki care kaise karte hain?

options.B: Dry clean ya gentle hand wash, avoid harsh scrubbing on mirrors

questions.explanation: Mirror work garments ko dry clean ya gentle hand wash karna chahiye, aur mirrors ko harsh scrubbing ya direct heat se bachana chahiye taaki woh damage na hon.

questions.question: Mirror work mein thread colour selection kaise karein?

options.B: Fabric colour se matching thread ya contrast thread use karein design ko highlight karne ke liye
options.D: Koi bhi available thread use karein

questions.explanation: Thread colour ko fabric se match karke subtle look de sakte hain, ya phir contrasting colour use karke mirrors ko highlight kar sakte hain, jo design par depend karta hai.

questions.question: Broken mirror se injury se kaise bachen, khaaskar jab kaam kar rahe hon?

options.A: Broken pieces ko haath se uthana
options.B: Gloves pehenna aur broken pieces ko carefully dispose karna
options.C: Unhe work area mein chhod dena

questions.explanation: Broken mirrors ke sharp edges dangerous ho sakte hain. Gloves pehenna aur unhe safely dispose karna cuts se bachne ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Mirror work mein outline stitch ka kya role hai?

options.B: Mirror ke charon taraf ek decorative border banana

questions.explanation: Outline stitch (jaise chain stitch, stem stitch) mirror ke charon taraf ek decorative border banata hai, jo design ko complete karta hai aur mirror ko emphasize karta hai.

questions.question: Round mirrors ko attach karne ka basic method kya involve karta hai?

options.B: Center mein ek stitch aur phir surrounding buttonhole stitches

questions.explanation: Round mirrors ko attach karne ke liye, pehle center mein ek stitch se mirror ko temporary secure kiya jaata hai, phir uske charon taraf buttonhole stitches se permanent attachment kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Mirror work designs mein variety kaise layein, client ki preference ke according?

options.A: Sirf ek hi size aur shape ke mirrors use karna
options.B: Different sizes, shapes (round, square, triangular) aur colours ke mirrors ko combine karna, aur alag-alag stitches use karna
options.D: Sirf ek type ke fabric par kaam karna

questions.explanation: Variety ke liye, different sizes, shapes aur colours ke mirrors ko mix & match karna, aur unhe alag-alag embroidery stitches se enhance karna design ko unique aur client-specific banata hai.

questions.question: Mirror work mein thread tension kitna hona chahiye?

options.A: Bahut loose, taaki mirror move ho
options.B: Bahut tight, taaki fabric puckering ho
options.C: Medium aur consistent, taaki mirror securely attached ho aur fabric puckering na ho

questions.explanation: Consistent aur medium thread tension zaroori hai. Bahut loose hone par mirror loose ho sakta hai, aur bahut tight hone par fabric puckering ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Mirror work ke liye kaunsa needle size best hai?

options.B: Fine needle (size 9-10) jo fabric aur thread ke liye suitable ho

questions.explanation: Fine needle (size 9-10) mirror work ke liye ideal hai kyunki yeh fabric mein clean holes banati hai aur delicate stitches ke liye suitable hai.

questions.question: Chikankari kis region ki famous embroidery hai?

options.B: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh

questions.explanation: Chikankari Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh ki ek traditional aur bahut hi intricate embroidery form hai.

questions.question: Chikankari mein kaunsa fabric traditionally use hota hai?

options.B: Velvet

questions.explanation: Chikankari traditionally fine cotton fabrics jaise mulmul par ki jaati hai, lekin modern times mein georgette aur chiffon par bhi popular hai.

questions.question: Tepchi stitch kya hai Chikankari mein?

options.B: Ek long running stitch jo design ki outline banata hai

questions.explanation: Tepchi ek long running stitch hai jo Chikankari mein design ki basic outline banane ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Bakhiya stitch ki khaasiyat kya hai Chikankari mein?

options.B: Yeh fabric ke back side par kiya jaata hai, jo front par shadow effect deta hai (Shadow work)
options.C: Yeh sirf floral motifs ke liye use hota hai

questions.explanation: Bakhiya (Shadow work) Chikankari ka ek unique stitch hai jisme stitching fabric ke back side par ki jaati hai, jisse front par ek beautiful shadow effect aata hai.

questions.question: Jaali work kaise banate hain Chikankari mein?

options.B: Threads ko cut karke aur phir stitch karke ek open mesh-like pattern banana

questions.explanation: Jaali work mein fabric ke threads ko carefully cut aur then stitch kiya jaata hai, jisse ek delicate, open, mesh-like pattern banta hai, bina koi hole create kiye.

questions.question: Murri stitch kisliye use hota hai Chikankari mein?

options.A: Large areas ko fill karne ke liye
options.B: Small, rice-shaped knots banane ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko join karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Murri stitch Chikankari mein small, rice-shaped knots banane ke liye use hota hai, jo design mein texture add karte hain.

questions.question: Phanda stitch kya hai Chikankari mein?

options.B: Small, millet-shaped knots banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Phanda Murri jaisa hi hai lekin thoda bada aur dense, jo small, millet-shaped knots banata hai, design mein raised texture add karne ke liye.

questions.question: Chikankari mein motifs ko transfer kaise karte hain?

options.B: Wooden blocks ya stencils se fabric par chhap kar (block printing)

questions.explanation: Chikankari mein designs ko traditionally wooden blocks ya stencils ka use karke fabric par transfer kiya jaata hai, jise chhapayi kehte hain.

questions.question: Authentic Chikankari ke liye kaunsa thread type aur count traditionally use hota hai aur kyun?

options.A: Thick metallic thread, chamak ke liye
options.B: Fine unbleached cotton thread (mulmul par 40-60 count), delicate aur subtle effect ke liye
options.C: Bright silk thread, colour ke liye
options.D: Rough jute thread, texture ke liye

questions.explanation: Authentic Chikankari mein fine, unbleached cotton thread (aksar 40-60 count) use hota hai. Yeh fabric ke saath blend ho jaata hai aur delicate, subtle, aur elegant 'white-on-white' effect deta hai, jo Chikankari ki pehchan hai.

questions.question: Hool stitch ka kya kaam hai Chikankari mein?

options.B: Small, detached eyelets ya holes banana, jo design mein lightness add karte hain

questions.explanation: Hool stitch Chikankari mein small, detached eyelets ya holes banane ke liye use hota hai, jo design ko airy aur delicate look dete hain.

questions.question: Kauri stitch kisliye use hota hai Chikankari mein?

options.B: Fabric par small, shell-like motifs banane ke liye
options.D: Threads ko secure karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Kauri stitch Chikankari mein small, shell-like (kauri) motifs banane ke liye use hota hai, jo design mein texture aur dimension add karte hain.

questions.question: Chikankari garments ki finishing mein kya steps hain?

options.B: Washing, bleaching (agar zaroori ho), starching, aur final pressing

questions.explanation: Chikankari garments ki finishing mein washing (transferred design marks hatane ke liye), bleaching (agar fabric yellow ho gaya ho), starching (fabric ko crisp banane ke liye) aur final pressing shamil hai.

questions.question: Daraz work kya hai Chikankari mein aur iski uniqueness kya hai?

options.B: Ek joint stitch jisme do fabric pieces ko intricate embroidery se join kiya jaata hai, jo seamless illusion deta hai

questions.explanation: Daraz work Chikankari ka ek intricate technique hai jisme do fabric pieces ko itni fine embroidery se join kiya jaata hai ki joint almost invisible ho jaata hai, ek seamless aur delicate look deta hai.

questions.question: Chikankari mein motifs typically kaise hote hain?

options.B: Floral aur paisley patterns

questions.explanation: Chikankari mein traditionally floral patterns jaise bel (creepers), phool (flowers), aur paisley motifs ka use hota hai.

questions.question: Chikankari design mein depth aur dimension kaise create karte hain, jabki yeh mostly 'white-on-white' hoti hai?

options.B: Different stitch types (jaise Bakhiya, Murri, Jaali) aur thread density ka judicious use karke

questions.explanation: Chikankari mein depth aur dimension different stitches ki texture, density aur placement se aati hai. Jaise Bakhiya shadow effect deta hai, Murri aur Phanda raised knots, aur Jaali openwork se lightness aati hai.

questions.question: Washed Chikankari garments ko starch karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Fabric ko crisp aur structured look dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Starching Chikankari garments ko unki original crispness aur structure wapas deta hai, khaaskar mulmul jaise delicate cotton fabrics ke liye.

questions.question: Authentic Chikankari ko machine-made imitation se kaise pehchanein?

options.B: Authentic Chikankari mein stitches ka variation, back side par neatness, aur hand-done Jaali work hota hai, jabki machine-made uniform aur often less intricate hoti hai
options.D: Authentic Chikankari mein koi knots nahi hote

questions.explanation: Authentic hand-embroidered Chikankari mein stitches mein slight variations, back side par neatness aur true Jaali work (threads cut aur re-stitched) dikhta hai. Machine-made mein stitches uniform hote hain aur Jaali often punched holes hoti hai.

questions.question: Embroidery ke liye fabric select karte waqt kya factors dekhte hain?

options.B: Fabric type, weave, weight, aur uski suitability for chosen embroidery style

questions.explanation: Fabric type, weave, weight, aur uski embroidery style ke saath compatibility dekhna zaroori hai taaki final product achha bane.

questions.question: Light-coloured aur delicate fabrics par design transfer ka best method kya hai?

options.B: Light box ya window tracing
options.C: Direct permanent marker se draw karna

questions.explanation: Light box ya window tracing method light fabrics par design transfer ke liye ideal hai kyunki yeh fabric ko mark ya damage nahi karta aur design clearly visible hota hai.

questions.question: Heavy embroidery (jaise Zardozi) ke liye kaunsa fabric sabse suitable hai?

options.B: Delicate Chiffon
options.C: Sturdy Silk, Velvet, ya heavy cotton

questions.explanation: Heavy embroidery ke weight aur density ko support karne ke liye sturdy fabrics jaise Silk, Velvet, ya heavy cotton ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Embroidery ke liye colour scheme select karte waqt kya factors consider karein?

options.B: Client ki preference, fabric colour, design ka mood, aur colour theory principles

questions.explanation: Ek effective colour scheme ke liye client ki preference, fabric colour, design ka mood (calm, vibrant) aur basic colour theory (complementary, analogous colours) ko consider karna chahiye.

questions.question: Design ko fabric par center karne ka sabse accurate tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Fabric ko fold karke center points mark karna
options.D: Sirf ek corner se start karna

questions.explanation: Fabric ko length aur width wise fold karke crease banana aur center points mark karna design ko accurately center karne ka sabse simple aur effective tareeka hai.

questions.question: Embroidery ke baad excess fabric trim karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Taaki piece neat aur professional lage, aur bulk kam ho

questions.explanation: Excess fabric ko trim karne se piece neat aur professional dikhta hai, aur backing ya lining lagate waqt bulk kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Backing fabric ka use kab karte hain embroidery mein?

options.B: Stitches ko protect karne, fabric ko stabilize karne aur final product ko neat look dene ke liye
options.D: Design ko hide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Backing fabric (jaise interfacing ya ek thin lining) stitches ko protect karta hai, fabric ko extra stability deta hai, aur embroidery ke back side ko neat finish deta hai.

questions.question: Ironing karte waqt embroidery ko protect kaise karein?

options.A: Directly iron ko embroidery par rakhna
options.B: Embroidery ko ek soft towel par ulta rakh kar, aur uske upar damp cloth rakh kar iron karna
options.D: Steam iron use karna bina protection ke

questions.explanation: Embroidery ko ulta rakh kar aur uske upar damp cloth rakh kar iron karne se stitches flatten nahi hote aur unki texture intact rehti hai.

questions.question: Shrinkage se bachne ke liye fabric ko embroidery se pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Fabric ko pre-wash aur dry karna

questions.explanation: Fabric ko pre-wash aur dry karne se uski natural shrinkage ho jaati hai, jisse embroidery ke baad design distort nahi hota.

questions.question: Ek complex embroidery design ko client ki budget constraints mein simplify kaise karein, without compromising too much on aesthetic?

options.A: Sirf design ka size chhota karna
options.B: Intricate stitches ko simpler ones se replace karna, density kam karna, ya motifs ki repetition kam karna
options.D: Client ko zyada pay karne ke liye convince karna

questions.explanation: Budget constraints mein, intricate stitches ko simpler stitches se replace karna, embroidery ki density kam karna, ya motifs ki repetition kam karna design ko cost-effective banata hai, jabki aesthetic ko bhi maintain rakhta hai.

questions.question: Customer ki preference ke according fabric kaise suggest karein, agar unhe koi specific idea na ho?

options.A: Koi bhi fabric suggest kar dena
options.B: Unki lifestyle, occasion, aur desired drape/feel ke bare mein puchhna, phir suitable options dikhana
options.C: Sirf sabse mehnga fabric suggest karna

questions.explanation: Customer ki lifestyle (daily wear vs. special occasion), desired drape (flowy vs. structured), aur feel (soft vs. crisp) samajhne se aap unhe sabse suitable fabric options suggest kar sakte hain, jisse unki satisfaction badhti hai.

questions.question: Washing ke baad embroidery mein thread pull ya snagging se kaise bachen?

options.A: Garment ko machine mein dusre kapdo ke saath wash karna
options.B: Hand wash karna, ya machine mein mesh laundry bag mein dal kar gentle cycle par wash karna

questions.explanation: Hand wash ya mesh laundry bag ka use karne se embroidery threads ko dusre kapdo se ulajhne ya snag hone se bachaya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Design mein repetition ka kya role hai?

options.B: Design mein harmony, rhythm aur balance create karna

questions.explanation: Motifs ya patterns ki repetition design mein ek visual rhythm aur harmony create karti hai, jo poore piece ko cohesive look deta hai.

questions.question: Contrast colours ka use design mein kisliye kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Elements ko highlight karne aur visual interest create karne ke liye
options.C: Design ko dull banane ke liye
options.D: Sirf ek colour use karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Contrast colours ka use design ke certain elements ko pop out karne, visual interest add karne aur ek dramatic effect create karne ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Finishing mein knots ko secure karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Taaki stitches loose na hon aur embroidery durable rahe
options.B: Taaki fabric rough ho jaaye

questions.explanation: Knots ko properly secure karne se stitches loose nahi hote aur embroidery ki durability badhti hai, jisse woh lambe samay tak achhi condition mein rehti hai.

questions.question: Embroidery project ki final quality check mein kya dekhte hain, jo client satisfaction ke liye crucial hai?

options.B: Stitch uniformity, neatness of back, loose threads ki absence, design alignment, aur overall finish

questions.explanation: Final quality check mein stitch uniformity, back side ki neatness, koi loose threads na hona, design ka proper alignment aur overall professional finish dekhna zaroori hai, jo client satisfaction ko ensure karta hai.

questions.question: Embroidery mein common defects kya hain?

options.B: Loose threads, uneven stitches, fabric puckering, design misalignment

questions.explanation: Loose threads, uneven stitches, fabric puckering aur design misalignment common defects hain jo embroidery ki quality ko affect karte hain.

questions.question: Loose threads ko kaise repair karein?

options.B: Needle se carefully fabric ke andar pull karke secure karna

questions.explanation: Loose threads ko needle se carefully fabric ke andar pull karke ya chhote stitches se secure karke repair kiya jaata hai, taaki woh aur na niklein.

questions.question: Ek embroidered product ki costing mein kya factors include hote hain?

options.B: Material cost, labor cost (time spent), design complexity, overheads, aur desired profit margin

questions.explanation: Costing mein material cost, labor cost (ghanto ke hisab se), design ki complexity, business ke overhead expenses, aur ek reasonable profit margin shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Customer satisfaction ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: High-quality product, timely delivery, aur excellent communication

questions.explanation: High-quality product, commitments par khara utarna, aur customer ke saath achhi communication rakhna customer satisfaction ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Workspace ko clean aur organized rakhna kyun important hai?

options.B: Efficiency badhane, materials ko contamination se bachane aur safety maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Customers ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Clean workspace se efficiency badhti hai, materials (jaise threads, fabrics) dust aur dirt se bachate hain, aur accidents ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Embroidery business ke liye social media ka use kaise karein?

options.B: Apne work ki high-quality photos/videos post karna, behind-the-scenes dikhana, aur customer engagement badhana

questions.explanation: Social media par apne work ki high-quality visuals share karna, process dikhana aur customers se interact karna brand awareness aur sales badhata hai.

questions.question: Quality control mein stitch uniformity ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sab stitches ek hi colour ke hon
options.B: Sab stitches ka size, tension aur spacing consistent ho

questions.explanation: Stitch uniformity ka matlab hai ki sab stitches evenly spaced hon, unki tension consistent ho, aur unka size uniform ho, jisse ek professional aur neat finish milti hai.

questions.question: Damaged embroidery (jaise loose threads, minor tears) ko restore karne ka tareeka kya hai, jisse original look maintain rahe?

options.B: Carefully loose threads ko re-stitch karna, matching thread se tears ko mend karna, aur fabric ko stabilize karna

questions.explanation: Damaged embroidery ko restore karne ke liye patience aur skill ki zaroorat hoti hai. Loose threads ko carefully re-stitch karna, matching thread se tears ko mend karna, aur fabric ko stabilize karna original look maintain karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Pricing strategy mein profit margin kaise decide karte hain?

options.A: Sirf competitors ka price dekh kar
options.B: Apni total cost (materials + labor + overheads) calculate karke, aur phir us par ek desired percentage add karke
options.D: Sirf material cost par depend karta hai

questions.explanation: Profit margin calculate karne ke liye, sabse pehle total cost (materials, labor, overheads) determine karein, phir us par ek reasonable percentage (jo market standard aur aapki value ko reflect kare) add karein.

questions.question: Client order receive karte waqt kya details confirm karni chahiye?

options.B: Design specifics, fabric type, colour scheme, delivery date, payment terms, aur special instructions

questions.explanation: Clear communication aur detailed order confirmation se miscommunications avoid hoti hain. Design, fabric, colours, deadline aur payment terms clear hone chahiye.

questions.question: Word-of-mouth marketing kya hai?

options.B: Happy customers ka aapke business ko dusron ko recommend karna

questions.explanation: Word-of-mouth marketing tab hoti hai jab satisfied customers aapke products ya services ke bare mein dusron ko batate hain, jo ek bahut powerful aur trustworthy marketing tool hai.

questions.question: Time management skills embroidery business mein kyun zaroori hain?

options.A: Sirf jaldi kaam khatam karne ke liye
options.B: Deadlines meet karne, multiple orders handle karne, aur work-life balance maintain karne ke liye
options.D: Apne kaam ko postpone karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Effective time management se aap deadlines meet kar sakte hain, multiple projects ko efficiently handle kar sakte hain, aur stress kam kar sakte hain, jo business success ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Embroidered products ki long-term maintenance tips kya hain?

options.B: Dry clean ya gentle hand wash, direct sunlight se bachana, aur proper storage

questions.explanation: Long-term maintenance ke liye dry clean ya gentle hand wash, direct sunlight exposure se bachana aur breathable fabric mein properly store karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Customer feedback ko kaise use karein business improve karne ke liye?

options.A: Sirf positive feedback ko accept karna
options.B: Both positive aur constructive feedback ko analyze karna, patterns dhundhna, aur improvements implement karna
options.D: Sirf friends aur family se feedback lena

questions.explanation: Customer feedback ek valuable resource hai. Positive feedback confidence deta hai, aur constructive feedback areas for improvement identify karne mein help karta hai, jisse business grow karta hai.

questions.question: Small-scale embroidery business start karne ke liye initial investment items mein kya include hota hai?

options.B: Basic tools (hoops, needles, scissors), initial thread aur fabric stock, design resources, aur marketing ke liye online presence

questions.explanation: Small-scale business ke liye basic tools, limited stock of threads aur fabrics, design resources (books, online tutorials) aur social media par ek simple online presence initial investment ke liye sufficient hai.

questions.question: Ethical practices in embroidery business mein kya include hota hai?

options.B: Fair wages dena, quality materials use karna, sustainable practices follow karna, aur original designs ka respect karna
options.C: Dusre artisans ke designs copy karna

questions.explanation: Ethical business practices mein workers ko fair wages dena, high-quality aur responsibly sourced materials use karna, environmental sustainability ka dhyan rakhna, aur intellectual property rights ka respect karna shamil hai.
